Who We Are

Uniting Minds For Change

About Us – InAmigos Foundation

InAmigos Foundation, founded on September 23, 2020 by Mr. Govind Shukla (Founder & CEO), is a Section 8 registered non-profit organisation committed to creating lasting social impact. Based in Chhattisgarh and operating across India, we address critical societal issues through a network of professionals and volunteers.

Our Credentials & Recognitions: 80G & 12A certified, CSR-1 registered, NITI Aayog registered, and IAF ISO 9001:2015 certified — ensuring transparency, accountability, and quality in every programme.

Key Initiatives:

  • Project SEVA — Over 50,000+ meals and clothing distributed to the underprivileged.
  • Project BACH PANSALA — Digital literacy, life skills, and school support for children.
  • Project JEEV — Animal welfare program feeding 50+ stray animals daily.
  • Project UDAAN — Women empowerment through SHG collaboration, skills and menstrual hygiene awareness.
  • Project PRAKRITI — Sustainability and environmental conservation: 20,000+ saplings planted.
  • Project VIKAS — Employment & skill development; trained 30,000+ interns in four years.

Join us — volunteer, partner, or donate to expand our reach and impact.

🎯

Our Mission

Empower underprivileged communities through education, welfare, and sustainable action.

🌏

Our Vision

An India where every individual — child, woman, animal — lives with dignity and opportunity.

🤝

Our Values

Compassion, inclusivity, integrity, and community-first service.

📜

Trusted & Certified

Section 8 NGO with 80G/12A, CSR-1, NITI Aayog registry and ISO 9001:2015 certification1:2015 certification.

2020 Founded with Purpose
What We Do

Ongoing Projects

Five active programmes, each addressing a critical gap — from a child's first classroom to a stray animal's next meal.

Education

Project Bachpanshala

Every child deserves a chance to learn and dream. Bachpanshala brings joyful, interactive education to children denied formal schooling — igniting curiosity and confidence through caring mentors and playful classrooms.

Learn more →
Women Empowerment

Project Udaan

Udaan equips women from underserved communities with vocational training, digital literacy, and financial education — transforming them from silent contributors to confident leaders and entrepreneurs.

Learn more →
Animal Welfare

Project JEEV

Every life matters — even those who cannot speak. JEEV treats injured street animals, feeds the hungry, and gives compassionate care to those who silently suffer. Because humanity includes all living beings. 🐾

Learn more →
Food & Clothing

Project SEWA

Small acts of kindness create big change. Through SEWA, IAF distributes food, clothing, and care to underprivileged communities — restoring dignity, warmth, and hope one family at a time.

Learn more →
Environment

Project Prakriti

Every child, every volunteer, every member of InAmigos pledges to plant a sapling — one plant in every home, street, and ground. Let's grow responsibility, resilience, and hope. 🌿

Learn more →

Dedicated volunteers across India

InAmigos Foundation creates a ripple of transformation — when a child reads their first word, when a woman launches her own enterprise, when a stray dog gets treated and fed, when a tree takes root in barren soil — society grows stronger together.


We operate across 15+ Indian states with registered status, complete financial transparency, and a volunteer-first culture that puts community at the heart of every decision.

  • Pan India operations across 15+ states
  • 100% volunteer-driven grassroots model
  • CSR & DARPAN registered — fully compliant
  • ISO 9001:2015 quality management certified
  • Zero administrative overhead policy
  • Annual impact reports published publicly

Get Involved

You Can Be the Change

🤝

Become a Volunteer

Your time and skills can transform lives. Join our network of 500+ passionate volunteers across India — teaching, feeding, planting, healing. No experience needed, only a willing heart.

  • ✦ Flexible time commitment
  • ✦ Work in your local community
  • ✦ Internship certificates available
  • ✦ Join from anywhere in India
Volunteer Now →
❤️

Support Our Mission

Even a small donation fuels enormous change. Fund a meal, sponsor a child's books, or contribute to animal care. Every rupee goes directly to the ground.

  • ✦ ₹100 feeds a family for a day
  • ✦ ₹500 gives a child a learning kit
  • ✦ ₹1000 treats an injured animal
  • ✦ UPI · GPay · PhonePe · Paytm
Donate Now ❤️
Voices of Change

What People Say

Straight from volunteers, beneficiaries, and community partners.

★★★★★

Volunteering with InAmigos through Project SEWA completely changed my perspective. Distributing food and clothes to families in need — and seeing the gratitude in their eyes — is something I will carry forever. This is what community looks like.

P
Priya Sharma
Volunteer, Delhi • Project SEWA
★★★★★

Project Udaan gave me the confidence and skills to start my own small business. Before, I thought it wasn't possible for someone like me. InAmigos Foundation didn't just train me — they believed in me when I couldn't believe in myself.

S
Savita Devi
Beneficiary • Project Udaan, Jharkhand
★★★★★

I joined IAF for my college internship and ended up staying for two years. The team is incredibly organised, the impact is real, and the work is deeply meaningful. If you want to do social good without the red tape, InAmigos is it.

A
Arjun Mehta
Core Volunteer • Project Bachpanshala, Pune
